title: Hyrule Reborn
description: A Minecraft Forge Mod that focuses on adding on brand new features from the Zelda franchise!
body: Hyrule Reborn is a Minecraft Forge mod that brings the iconic world of The Legend of Zelda to life in Minecraft. Inspired by the lore, characters, and landscapes of The Legend of Zelda series, this mod immerses players in a rich, adventure-filled experience with new biomes, structures, items, and creatures drawn directly from the beloved franchise. Whether you're exploring the wilds of Hyrule, battling Ganon’s minions, or wielding legendary weapons like the Master Sword, Hyrule Reborn offers a brand new dimension of adventure to your Minecraft world.
